# Complete Table Reference — Kafka Streaming Medallion Architecture

**Total: 27 tables** (1 Landing + 1 Bronze + 6 Silver Base + 4 Silver Enriched + 7 Gold Curated + 4 Gold RT + 4 Gold Batch)

---

## 🔵 Landing Layer — Raw Kafka Files

### `landing.raw_events` — Streaming

**Purpose**: Durable buffer between Kafka and the pipeline. Enables replay without relying on Kafka retention.

**Generated by**: Spark `readStream` from Kafka → `writeStream` to Delta (append mode)

| Column | Type | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `key` | binary | Kafka message key |
| `value` | string | Raw JSON payload (untouched) |
| `topic` | string | Kafka topic name |
| `partition` | int | Kafka partition number |
| `offset` | long | Kafka offset |
| `kafka_timestamp` | timestamp | Kafka event timestamp |
| `landing_ingest_ts` | timestamp | `current_timestamp()` at write time |

**Use**: Disaster recovery, replay, auditing. If Bronze logic changes, re-process from here.

---

## 🟤 Bronze Layer

### `bronze.orders_raw` — Streaming

**Purpose**: First queryable table. Adds pipeline metadata without modifying the payload.

**Generated by**: Spark `readStream` from Landing → extract `source_system` + `ingestion_time` from JSON → `writeStream` to Delta (append mode)

| Column | Type | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `source_system` | string | Extracted from JSON root |
| `ingestion_time` | timestamp | Extracted from JSON root |
| `raw_payload` | string | Full JSON string (not flattened) |
| `kafka_topic` | string | Carried from Landing |
| `kafka_partition` | int | Carried from Landing |
| `kafka_offset` | long | Carried from Landing |
| `kafka_timestamp` | timestamp | Carried from Landing |
| `bronze_ingest_ts` | timestamp | `current_timestamp()` at Bronze write |

**Use**: Monitor pipeline health ("when did data arrive?"), filter by `source_system`, debug raw payloads.

---

## ⚪ Silver Base Layer — Streaming Fact Tables (6 tables)

All generated by: Spark `readStream` from Bronze → parse JSON → explode arrays → flatten structs → `writeStream` to Delta.

All use **business keys** (e.g., `customer_id`), NOT surrogate keys.

---

### 1. `silver_order_fact_RT` — Streaming

**Purpose**: One row per order. Central fact table linking to all other Silver tables.

**Generated by**: Parse `raw_payload` JSON → extract order-level scalars + device_context + charges

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `order_id` | string | PK | `order.order_id` |
| `order_time` | timestamp | | `order.order_time` |
| `order_status` | string | | `order.status` (CREATED/PAID/SHIPPED) |
| `customer_id` | string | BK | `order.customer.customer_id` |
| `store_id` | string | BK | `store_details.store_id` |
| `total_items` | int | | `len(order.items)` |
| `shipping_fee` | decimal | | `order.charges.shipping_fee` |
| `tax` | decimal | | `order.charges.tax` |
| `currency` | string | | `order.charges.currency` |
| `platform` | string | | `order.device_context.platform` |
| `app_version` | string | | `order.device_context.app_version` |
| `source_system` | string | | root `source_system` |
| `bronze_ingest_ts` | timestamp | | Lineage from Bronze |

**Use**: Core order data. Feeds Gold fact_orders (batch) and Gold RT KPIs (streaming).

---

### 2. `silver_order_event_fact_RT` — Streaming

**Purpose**: One row per lifecycle event. Tracks CREATED → PAID → SHIPPED transitions.

**Generated by**: Explode `order.order_events[]` array — each element becomes a row

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `order_id` | string | PK (composite) | `order.order_id` |
| `event_type` | string | PK (composite) | `order_events[].event_type` |
| `event_time` | timestamp | | `order_events[].event_time` |

**Use**: Funnel analysis (created→paid conversion rate), order lifecycle timing.

---

### 3. `silver_order_item_fact_RT` — Streaming

**Purpose**: One row per item in an order. Carries denormalized product attributes for RT KPIs.

**Generated by**: Explode `order.items[]` → flatten `product_details` → compute total discount

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `order_id` | string | FK | `order.order_id` |
| `item_id` | string | PK | `items[].item_id` |
| `product_id` | string | BK | `items[].product_details.product_id` |
| `product_name` | string | | `items[].product_details.product_name` |
| `brand` | string | | `items[].product_details.brand` |
| `category` | string | | `items[].product_details.category` |
| `price` | decimal | | `items[].price` |
| `quantity` | int | | `items[].quantity` |
| `discount_amount` | decimal | | `SUM(items[].discounts[].amount)` |

**Use**: Revenue analysis, product performance. Product attrs are denormalized here because streaming RT KPIs can't wait for batch dims.

---

### 4. `silver_payment_attempt_fact_RT` — Streaming

**Purpose**: One row per payment attempt. Captures retries and failures.

**Generated by**: Explode `order.payments[]` — each payment attempt becomes a row

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `payment_id` | string | PK | `payments[].payment_id` |
| `order_id` | string | FK | `order.order_id` |
| `payment_method` | string | | `payments[].method` (UPI/CARD/NET_BANKING) |
| `provider` | string | | `payments[].provider` (PhonePe/Mastercard/HDFC) |
| `status` | string | | `payments[].status` (SUCCESS/FAILED) |
| `failure_reason` | string | | `payments[].failure_reason` (nullable) |
| `attempt_time` | timestamp | | `payments[].attempt_time` |

**Use**: Payment reliability monitoring, provider failure rate analysis.

---

### 5. `silver_delivery_fact_RT` — Streaming

**Purpose**: One row per order's delivery. Tracks shipment from dispatch to doorstep.

**Generated by**: Flatten `order.delivery` struct → extract partner_id from nested struct

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `order_id` | string | PK | `order.order_id` |
| `partner_id` | string | BK | `delivery.delivery_partner.partner_id` |
| `delivery_type` | string | | `delivery.delivery_type` (STANDARD/EXPRESS) |
| `dispatch_time` | timestamp | | `delivery.dispatch_time` (nullable) |
| `actual_delivery_time` | timestamp | | `delivery.actual_delivery_time` (nullable) |
| `expected_delivery_date` | date | | `delivery.expected_delivery_date` |
| `sla_days` | int | | `delivery.sla_days` |
| `delivery_attempts` | int | | `delivery.delivery_attempts` |

**Use**: Delivery SLA monitoring, partner performance tracking.

---

### 6. `silver_discount_fact_RT` — Streaming

**Purpose**: One row per discount applied to an item. Captures individual promo code usage.

**Generated by**: Explode `order.items[]` → explode `items[].discounts[]` — double explosion

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `order_id` | string | FK | `order.order_id` |
| `item_id` | string | FK | `items[].item_id` |
| `discount_type` | string | | `discounts[].discount_type` |
| `discount_code` | string | | `discounts[].code` |
| `amount` | decimal | | `discounts[].amount` |

**Use**: Promo code effectiveness analysis, discount ROI.

---

## ⚪ Silver Enriched Layer — SCD Type 2 Dimensions (4 tables)

All generated by: **Batch** job reads Silver Base facts → extracts unique entity attributes → compares with existing dimension → MERGE (insert new version if attributes changed, close old version).

All have: `surrogate_key` (PK), `business_key` (UK), `effective_from`, `effective_to`, `is_current`.

---

### 7. `silver_customer_dim` — Batch (SCD2)

**Purpose**: System of record for customer attribute history.

**Generated by**: Extract unique (`customer_id`, `first_name`, `last_name`, `city`, `zip`, `segment`, `loyalty_tier`) from `silver_order_fact_RT` + parsed customer fields → MERGE with existing dim

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `customer_sk` | bigint | PK | Auto-generated (row_number) |
| `customer_id` | string | UK | `order.customer.customer_id` |
| `first_name` | string | | `order.customer.name.first_name` |
| `last_name` | string | | `order.customer.name.last_name` |
| `city` | string | | `order.customer.address.city` |
| `zip` | string | | `order.customer.address.zip` |
| `segment` | string | | `order.customer.attributes.segment` |
| `loyalty_tier` | string | | `order.customer.attributes.loyalty_tier` |
| `effective_from` | timestamp | | When this version became active |
| `effective_to` | timestamp | | When superseded (default: 9999-12-31) |
| `is_current` | boolean | | `true` for latest version |

**SCD2 trigger**: Any change in `segment`, `loyalty_tier`, `city`, or `zip`.

**Use**: Enables historically correct surrogate key resolution in Gold facts.

---

### 8. `silver_product_dim` — Batch (SCD2)

**Purpose**: Track product attribute changes (name, brand, category reclassification).

**Generated by**: Extract unique products from `silver_order_item_fact_RT` → MERGE

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `product_sk` | bigint | PK | Auto-generated |
| `product_id` | string | UK | `items[].product_details.product_id` |
| `product_name` | string | | `items[].product_details.product_name` |
| `brand` | string | | `items[].product_details.brand` |
| `category` | string | | `items[].product_details.category` |
| `effective_from` | timestamp | | |
| `effective_to` | timestamp | | |
| `is_current` | boolean | | |

**SCD2 trigger**: Change in `product_name`, `brand`, or `category`.

---

### 9. `silver_store_dim` — Batch (SCD2)

**Purpose**: Track store attribute changes (type, region reclassification).

**Generated by**: Extract unique stores from `silver_order_fact_RT` + parsed store fields → MERGE

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `store_sk` | bigint | PK | Auto-generated |
| `store_id` | string | UK | `store_details.store_id` |
| `store_type` | string | | `store_details.store_attributes.store_type` |
| `region` | string | | `store_details.region` |
| `city` | string | | `store_details.city` |
| `state` | string | | `store_details.state` |
| `effective_from` | timestamp | | |
| `effective_to` | timestamp | | |
| `is_current` | boolean | | |

**SCD2 trigger**: Change in `store_type`, `region`, `city`, or `state`.

---

### 10. `silver_delivery_partner_dim` — Batch (SCD2)

**Purpose**: Track delivery partner changes (name, type).

**Generated by**: Extract unique partners from `silver_delivery_fact_RT` + parsed partner fields → MERGE

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `delivery_partner_sk` | bigint | PK | Auto-generated |
| `partner_id` | string | UK | `delivery.delivery_partner.partner_id` |
| `partner_name` | string | | `delivery.delivery_partner.partner_name` |
| `partner_type` | string | | `delivery.delivery_partner.partner_type` |
| `effective_from` | timestamp | | |
| `effective_to` | timestamp | | |
| `is_current` | boolean | | |

**SCD2 trigger**: Change in `partner_name` or `partner_type`.

---

## 🟡 Gold Curated Layer — Star Schema

### Enriched Dimensions (4 dims + 1 date dim — all Batch)

---

### 11. `gold_dim_customer` — Batch

**Purpose**: BI-ready customer dimension with pre-computed business metrics per SCD2 version.

**Generated by**: JOIN `silver_customer_dim` with `gold_fact_orders` + `silver_payment_attempt_fact_RT` → aggregate per `customer_sk`

| Column | Type | Source | How |
|---|---|---|---|
| `customer_sk` | bigint | `silver_customer_dim` | PK, direct copy |
| `customer_id` | string | `silver_customer_dim` | |
| `first_name` | string | `silver_customer_dim` | |
| `last_name` | string | `silver_customer_dim` | |
| `city` | string | `silver_customer_dim` | |
| `zip` | string | `silver_customer_dim` | |
| `segment` | string | `silver_customer_dim` | |
| `loyalty_tier` | string | `silver_customer_dim` | |
| `is_current` | boolean | `silver_customer_dim` | |
| **`total_orders`** | int | `gold_fact_orders` | `COUNT(order_id)` per sk |
| **`total_spend`** | decimal | `gold_fact_orders` | `SUM(shipping_fee + tax) + SUM(item revenue)` |
| **`avg_order_value`** | decimal | derived | `total_spend / total_orders` |
| **`first_order_date`** | date | `gold_fact_orders` | `MIN(order_date)` |
| **`last_order_date`** | date | `gold_fact_orders` | `MAX(order_date)` |
| **`days_since_last_order`** | int | derived | `current_date - last_order_date` |
| **`preferred_payment_method`** | string | `silver_payment_attempt_fact_RT` | Mode of successful payment methods |
| **`preferred_platform`** | string | `gold_fact_orders` | Mode of platform (ANDROID/IOS/WEB) |
| **`payment_failure_rate`** | decimal | `silver_payment_attempt_fact_RT` | `failed / total attempts` |

**Use**: Customer segmentation, churn detection, lifetime value analysis — queryable without any joins.

---

### 12. `gold_dim_product` — Batch

**Purpose**: BI-ready product dimension with sales performance metrics per SCD2 version.

**Generated by**: JOIN `silver_product_dim` with `gold_fact_order_items` → aggregate per `product_sk`

| Column | Type | Source | How |
|---|---|---|---|
| `product_sk` | bigint | `silver_product_dim` | PK |
| `product_id` | string | `silver_product_dim` | |
| `product_name` | string | `silver_product_dim` | |
| `brand` | string | `silver_product_dim` | |
| `category` | string | `silver_product_dim` | |
| `is_current` | boolean | `silver_product_dim` | |
| **`total_units_sold`** | int | `gold_fact_order_items` | `SUM(quantity)` |
| **`total_revenue`** | decimal | `gold_fact_order_items` | `SUM(price × quantity)` |
| **`total_discount_given`** | decimal | `gold_fact_order_items` | `SUM(discount_amount)` |
| **`discount_rate`** | decimal | derived | `total_discount_given / total_revenue` |
| **`avg_selling_price`** | decimal | derived | `total_revenue / total_units_sold` |
| **`num_orders`** | int | `gold_fact_order_items` | `COUNT(DISTINCT order_id)` |
| **`num_unique_buyers`** | int | `gold_fact_orders` + items | `COUNT(DISTINCT customer_sk)` |

**Use**: Product ranking, discount impact analysis, identifying best-sellers.

---

### 13. `gold_dim_store` — Batch

**Purpose**: BI-ready store dimension with operational metrics per SCD2 version.

**Generated by**: JOIN `silver_store_dim` with `gold_fact_orders` + `silver_delivery_fact_RT` → aggregate per `store_sk`

| Column | Type | Source | How |
|---|---|---|---|
| `store_sk` | bigint | `silver_store_dim` | PK |
| `store_id` | string | `silver_store_dim` | |
| `store_type` | string | `silver_store_dim` | |
| `region` | string | `silver_store_dim` | |
| `city` | string | `silver_store_dim` | |
| `state` | string | `silver_store_dim` | |
| `is_current` | boolean | `silver_store_dim` | |
| **`total_orders`** | int | `gold_fact_orders` | `COUNT(order_id)` |
| **`total_revenue`** | decimal | `gold_fact_orders` + items | `SUM(revenue)` |
| **`avg_order_value`** | decimal | derived | `total_revenue / total_orders` |
| **`unique_customers`** | int | `gold_fact_orders` | `COUNT(DISTINCT customer_sk)` |
| **`top_category`** | string | `gold_fact_order_items` | Category with highest revenue |
| **`avg_delivery_time_hours`** | decimal | `silver_delivery_fact_RT` | `AVG(actual - dispatch)` |
| **`express_delivery_pct`** | decimal | `silver_delivery_fact_RT` | `% of EXPRESS orders` |

**Use**: Store performance comparison (OWNED vs FRANCHISE), regional analysis.

---

### 14. `gold_dim_delivery_partner` — Batch

**Purpose**: BI-ready delivery partner scorecard per SCD2 version.

**Generated by**: JOIN `silver_delivery_partner_dim` with `silver_delivery_fact_RT` → aggregate per `delivery_partner_sk`

| Column | Type | Source | How |
|---|---|---|---|
| `delivery_partner_sk` | bigint | `silver_delivery_partner_dim` | PK |
| `partner_id` | string | `silver_delivery_partner_dim` | |
| `partner_name` | string | `silver_delivery_partner_dim` | |
| `partner_type` | string | `silver_delivery_partner_dim` | |
| `is_current` | boolean | `silver_delivery_partner_dim` | |
| **`total_deliveries`** | int | `silver_delivery_fact_RT` | `COUNT(order_id)` |
| **`avg_delivery_time_hours`** | decimal | `silver_delivery_fact_RT` | `AVG(actual - dispatch)` |
| **`sla_breach_rate`** | decimal | `silver_delivery_fact_RT` | `% where actual > expected` |
| **`first_attempt_success_rate`** | decimal | `silver_delivery_fact_RT` | `% where delivery_attempts = 1` |
| **`avg_delivery_attempts`** | decimal | `silver_delivery_fact_RT` | `AVG(delivery_attempts)` |
| **`express_delivery_pct`** | decimal | `silver_delivery_fact_RT` | `% of EXPRESS deliveries` |

**Use**: Partner scorecard, SLA monitoring, routing decisions.

---

### 15. `gold_dim_date` — Static (generated once)

**Purpose**: Standard calendar dimension for time-based analysis.

**Generated by**: Python/Spark script generates all dates in a range (e.g., 2024-01-01 to 2030-12-31)

| Column | Type | How |
|---|---|---|
| `date_key` | int | YYYYMMDD format (e.g., 20260103) |
| `full_date` | date | 2026-01-03 |
| `day_of_week` | string | Monday, Tuesday, ... |
| `day_of_month` | int | 1-31 |
| `month` | int | 1-12 |
| `month_name` | string | January, February, ... |
| `quarter` | int | 1-4 |
| `year` | int | 2026 |
| `is_weekend` | boolean | Saturday/Sunday = true |

**Use**: Enables "sales by quarter", "orders on weekends" without date functions in queries.

---

### Curated Facts (2 tables — Batch)

---

### 16. `gold_fact_orders` — Batch

**Purpose**: Order fact with surrogate keys **frozen at event time**. Converts business keys → surrogate keys via time-range join (done once, never re-computed).

**Generated by**:
```sql
SELECT
  o.order_id,
  CAST(DATE_FORMAT(o.order_time, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) AS order_date_key,
  c.customer_sk,
  s.store_sk,
  o.order_status, o.total_items, o.shipping_fee, o.tax, o.currency, o.platform
FROM silver_order_fact_RT o
JOIN silver_customer_dim c
  ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
 AND o.order_time >= c.effective_from AND o.order_time < c.effective_to
JOIN silver_store_dim s
  ON o.store_id = s.store_id
 AND o.order_time >= s.effective_from AND o.order_time < s.effective_to
```

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `order_id` | string | PK | `silver_order_fact_RT` |
| `order_date_key` | int | FK → dim_date | Derived from `order_time` |
| `customer_sk` | bigint | FK → dim_customer | **Time-range join** with `silver_customer_dim` |
| `store_sk` | bigint | FK → dim_store | **Time-range join** with `silver_store_dim` |
| `order_status` | string | | `silver_order_fact_RT` |
| `total_items` | int | | `silver_order_fact_RT` |
| `shipping_fee` | decimal | | `silver_order_fact_RT` |
| `tax` | decimal | | `silver_order_fact_RT` |
| `currency` | string | | `silver_order_fact_RT` |
| `platform` | string | | `silver_order_fact_RT` |

**Use**: Central fact for all star schema queries. Join to any Gold dim with simple `ON sk = sk`.

---

### 17. `gold_fact_order_items` — Batch

**Purpose**: Item-level fact with product surrogate key frozen at purchase time.

**Generated by**:
```sql
SELECT
  i.order_id, i.item_id,
  p.product_sk,
  i.price, i.quantity, i.discount_amount
FROM silver_order_item_fact_RT i
JOIN silver_order_fact_RT o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN silver_product_dim p
  ON i.product_id = p.product_id
 AND o.order_time >= p.effective_from AND o.order_time < p.effective_to
```

| Column | Type | Key | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `order_id` | string | FK | `silver_order_item_fact_RT` |
| `item_id` | string | PK | `silver_order_item_fact_RT` |
| `product_sk` | bigint | FK → dim_product | **Time-range join** with `silver_product_dim` |
| `price` | decimal | | `silver_order_item_fact_RT` |
| `quantity` | int | | `silver_order_item_fact_RT` |
| `discount_amount` | decimal | | `silver_order_item_fact_RT` |

**Use**: Item-level revenue analysis. Join to `gold_dim_product` via `product_sk`.

---

## 🟡 Gold Semantic RT — Real-Time KPI Tables (4 tables — Streaming)

All generated by: Spark `readStream` from Silver Base facts → windowed aggregations → `writeStream` to Delta.

Used during **live events** (Black Friday, flash sales) for operational dashboards.

---

### 18. `gold_sales_summary_RT` — Streaming

**Purpose**: Real-time revenue, order count, items sold — by store × region × category.

**Generated by**: JOIN `silver_order_fact_RT` + `silver_order_item_fact_RT` → GROUP BY store_id, category, 5-min window

| Column | Type | How |
|---|---|---|
| `window_start` | timestamp | 5-min tumbling window start |
| `window_end` | timestamp | 5-min tumbling window end |
| `store_id` | string | From `silver_order_fact_RT` |
| `region` | string | Looked up from store context |
| `category` | string | From `silver_order_item_fact_RT` |
| `total_orders` | bigint | `COUNT(DISTINCT order_id)` |
| `total_items_sold` | bigint | `SUM(quantity)` |
| `total_revenue` | decimal | `SUM(price × quantity - discount_amount)` |
| `total_discount_amount` | decimal | `SUM(discount_amount)` |
| `avg_order_value` | decimal | `total_revenue / total_orders` |

**Dashboard use**: *"₹2.3 Cr in Electronics revenue in the last 5 minutes across West region"*

---

### 19. `gold_category_sales_metrics_RT` — Streaming

**Purpose**: Real-time category-level performance breakdown.

**Generated by**: Aggregate `silver_order_item_fact_RT` → GROUP BY category, 5-min window

| Column | Type | How |
|---|---|---|
| `window_start` | timestamp | 5-min tumbling window |
| `window_end` | timestamp | |
| `category` | string | From item fact |
| `total_orders` | bigint | `COUNT(DISTINCT order_id)` |
| `total_quantity_sold` | bigint | `SUM(quantity)` |
| `total_revenue` | decimal | `SUM(price × quantity)` |
| `avg_item_price` | decimal | `AVG(price)` |
| `discount_percentage` | decimal | `SUM(discount) / SUM(revenue)` |

**Dashboard use**: *"Electronics outperforming Furniture 3:1 during flash sale"*

---

### 20. `gold_payment_usage_metrics_RT` — Streaming

**Purpose**: Real-time payment method health and failure monitoring.

**Generated by**: Aggregate `silver_payment_attempt_fact_RT` → GROUP BY payment_method, 5-min window

| Column | Type | How |
|---|---|---|
| `window_start` | timestamp | 5-min tumbling window |
| `window_end` | timestamp | |
| `payment_method` | string | UPI/CARD/NET_BANKING |
| `total_attempts` | bigint | `COUNT(payment_id)` |
| `successful_payments` | bigint | `COUNT WHERE status = 'SUCCESS'` |
| `failed_payments` | bigint | `COUNT WHERE status = 'FAILED'` |
| `usage_percentage` | decimal | `this_method / total across all methods` |
| `failure_rate` | decimal | `failed / total` |

**Dashboard use**: *"UPI failure rate spiked to 8% — alert ops team!"*

---

### 21. `gold_order_lifecycle_metrics_RT` — Streaming

**Purpose**: Real-time order funnel and conversion timing.

**Generated by**: Aggregate `silver_order_event_fact_RT` → pivot event types → compute rates

| Column | Type | How |
|---|---|---|
| `window_start` | timestamp | 5-min tumbling window |
| `window_end` | timestamp | |
| `orders_created` | bigint | `COUNT WHERE event_type = 'CREATED'` |
| `orders_paid` | bigint | `COUNT WHERE event_type = 'PAID'` |
| `orders_shipped` | bigint | `COUNT WHERE event_type = 'SHIPPED'` |
| `created_to_paid_rate` | decimal | `orders_paid / orders_created` |
| `paid_to_shipped_rate` | decimal | `orders_shipped / orders_paid` |
| `avg_created_to_paid_secs` | bigint | `AVG(paid_time - created_time)` in seconds |
| `avg_paid_to_shipped_secs` | bigint | `AVG(shipped_time - paid_time)` in seconds |

**Dashboard use**: *"Only 60% created→paid — checkout might be broken during sale!"*

---

## 🟡 Gold Semantic Batch — Daily/Weekly KPI Tables (4 tables — Batch)

All generated by: Batch read from Gold Curated facts + Silver dims → aggregate → write to Delta.

Used for **daily reporting, historical trends, executive dashboards**.

---

### 22. `gold_sales_summary` — Batch

**Purpose**: Daily sales by store × region × category (with historically correct dimension context).

**Generated by**: JOIN `gold_fact_orders` + `gold_fact_order_items` + Silver dims → GROUP BY date, store, region, category

| Column | Type | How |
|---|---|---|
| `sale_date` | date | PK — from `order_date_key` |
| `store_id` | string | PK — from `silver_store_dim` |
| `region` | string | PK — from `silver_store_dim` |
| `category` | string | PK — from `silver_product_dim` |
| `total_orders` | bigint | `COUNT(DISTINCT order_id)` |
| `total_items_sold` | bigint | `SUM(quantity)` |
| `total_revenue` | decimal | `SUM(price × quantity - discount)` |
| `total_discount_amount` | decimal | `SUM(discount_amount)` |
| `avg_order_value` | decimal | `total_revenue / total_orders` |

**Report use**: *"January 3rd: ST-001 sold ₹52K in Electronics across Northeast"*

---

### 23. `gold_category_sales_metrics` — Batch

**Purpose**: Daily category performance with discount analysis.

**Generated by**: Aggregate `gold_fact_order_items` + product dim → GROUP BY date, category

| Column | Type | How |
|---|---|---|
| `sale_date` | date | PK |
| `category` | string | PK — from `silver_product_dim` |
| `total_orders` | bigint | `COUNT(DISTINCT order_id)` |
| `total_quantity_sold` | bigint | `SUM(quantity)` |
| `total_revenue` | decimal | `SUM(price × quantity)` |
| `avg_item_price` | decimal | `AVG(price)` |
| `discount_percentage` | decimal | `SUM(discount) / SUM(revenue) × 100` |

**Report use**: *"Electronics had 15% discount rate vs Furniture at 0% — are we over-discounting?"*

---

### 24. `gold_discount_effectiveness` — Batch

**Purpose**: Which promo codes are actually driving revenue vs just giving money away?

**Generated by**: JOIN `silver_discount_fact_RT` + `silver_order_item_fact_RT` → GROUP BY date, code, category

| Column | Type | How |
|---|---|---|
| `sale_date` | date | PK |
| `discount_code` | string | PK — from `silver_discount_fact_RT` |
| `category` | string | PK — from item fact |
| `discounted_orders` | bigint | `COUNT(DISTINCT order_id)` |
| `total_discount_amount` | decimal | `SUM(discount amount)` |
| `discounted_revenue` | decimal | `SUM(price × quantity)` for discounted items |
| `avg_discount_per_order` | decimal | `total_discount / discounted_orders` |

**Report use**: *"ELEC15 drove ₹50L revenue but gave ₹8L in discounts — 16% discount rate. Worth it?"*

---

### 25. `gold_delivery_partner_metrics` — Batch

**Purpose**: Weekly delivery partner scorecard for operations.

**Generated by**: JOIN `silver_delivery_fact_RT` + `silver_delivery_partner_dim` → GROUP BY week, partner

| Column | Type | How |
|---|---|---|
| `week_start_date` | date | PK — Monday of the week |
| `delivery_partner_id` | string | PK |
| `delivery_partner_name` | string | From `silver_delivery_partner_dim` |
| `total_deliveries` | bigint | `COUNT(order_id)` |
| `avg_delivery_time_hours` | decimal | `AVG(actual - dispatch)` in hours |
| `p90_delivery_time_hours` | decimal | 90th percentile delivery time |
| `sla_breach_rate` | decimal | `% where actual > expected` |
| `first_attempt_success_rate` | decimal | `% where delivery_attempts = 1` |

**Report use**: *"Delhivery: 95% first-attempt success, 2% SLA breach. FedEx: faster avg but 5% SLA breach."*

---

## Complete Summary

| # | Layer | Table | Type | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Landing | `raw_events` | Streaming | Raw Kafka buffer for replay |
| 2 | Bronze | `orders_raw` | Streaming | First queryable table, pipeline monitoring |
| 3 | Silver Base | `order_fact_RT` | Streaming | One row per order |
| 4 | Silver Base | `order_event_fact_RT` | Streaming | Order lifecycle transitions |
| 5 | Silver Base | `order_item_fact_RT` | Streaming | Items purchased |
| 6 | Silver Base | `payment_attempt_fact_RT` | Streaming | Payment attempts and failures |
| 7 | Silver Base | `delivery_fact_RT` | Streaming | Shipment tracking |
| 8 | Silver Base | `discount_fact_RT` | Streaming | Promo code usage |
| 9 | Silver Enriched | `customer_dim` | Batch SCD2 | Customer attribute history |
| 10 | Silver Enriched | `product_dim` | Batch SCD2 | Product attribute history |
| 11 | Silver Enriched | `store_dim` | Batch SCD2 | Store attribute history |
| 12 | Silver Enriched | `delivery_partner_dim` | Batch SCD2 | Partner attribute history |
| 13 | Gold Curated | `dim_customer` | Batch | Customer + derived metrics |
| 14 | Gold Curated | `dim_product` | Batch | Product + sales metrics |
| 15 | Gold Curated | `dim_store` | Batch | Store + operational metrics |
| 16 | Gold Curated | `dim_delivery_partner` | Batch | Partner scorecard |
| 17 | Gold Curated | `dim_date` | Static | Calendar dimension |
| 18 | Gold Curated | `fact_orders` | Batch | Orders with frozen surrogate keys |
| 19 | Gold Curated | `fact_order_items` | Batch | Items with frozen product SK |
| 20 | Gold Semantic RT | `sales_summary_RT` | Streaming | Live revenue dashboard |
| 21 | Gold Semantic RT | `category_sales_metrics_RT` | Streaming | Live category performance |
| 22 | Gold Semantic RT | `payment_usage_metrics_RT` | Streaming | Live payment health |
| 23 | Gold Semantic RT | `order_lifecycle_metrics_RT` | Streaming | Live order funnel |
| 24 | Gold Semantic Batch | `sales_summary` | Batch | Daily sales report |
| 25 | Gold Semantic Batch | `category_sales_metrics` | Batch | Daily category report |
| 26 | Gold Semantic Batch | `discount_effectiveness` | Batch | Promo code ROI |
| 27 | Gold Semantic Batch | `delivery_partner_metrics` | Batch | Weekly partner scorecard |

**Total: 27 tables** — 12 Streaming, 14 Batch, 1 Static
